'''zaroso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kadiluk|kadiluk]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kadiluk|kadiluk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zaroso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæreseth|zæreseth]] || [[word:zæresej|zæresej]] || [[word:zæresesh|zæresesh]] || [[word:zærese|zærese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zarorosoth|zarorosoth]] || [[word:zarorosoj|zarorosoj]] || [[word:zarorososh|zarorososh]] || [[word:zaroroso|zaroroso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zarosoth|zarosoth]] || [[word:zarosoj|zarosoj]] || [[word:zarososh|zarososh]] || [[word:zaroso|zaroso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zarofsoth|zarofsoth]] || [[word:zarofsoj|zarofsoj]] || [[word:zarofsosh|zarofsosh]] || [[word:zarofsof|zarofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zarosotho|zarosotho]] || [[word:zarosojo|zarosojo]] || [[word:zarososho|zarososho]] || [[word:zarosoko|zarosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zarosoth|zarosoth]] || [[word:zarosoj|zarosoj]] || [[word:zarososh|zarososh]] || [[word:zaroso|zaroso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zarosothol|zarosothol]] || [[word:zarosojol|zarosojol]] || [[word:zarososhol|zarososhol]] || [[word:zarosokol|zarosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zarosothotho|zarosothotho]] || [[word:zarosojojo|zarosojojo]] || [[word:zarososhosho|zarososhosho]] || [[word:zarosoko|zarosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zarosothon|zarosothon]] || [[word:zarosojon|zarosojon]] || [[word:zarososhon|zarososhon]] || [[word:zarosokon|zarosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zarosothoro|zarosothoro]] || [[word:zarosojoro|zarosojoro]] || [[word:zarososhoro|zarososhoro]] || [[word:zarosokoro|zarosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
